privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task operates on synthetically generated files and bookmarks initialized via setup_task.sh. The expected Chrome flags ('enable-experimental-web-platform-features@1', 'enable-gpu-rasterization@1', 'smooth-scrolling@2', 'enable-quic@2'), custom search keywords ('dribbble', 'gfonts', 'icons'), and download directory ('/home/ga/projects/design-assets') explicitly match the task description instructions and verifier logic.
